codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature intent: overlays (ErrorToast and both ConfirmationModal instances) were moved out of inline +page.svelte markup into WorkspaceContentPanel via explicit Svelte 5 props interfaces, with no blocking regressions found in the reviewed diff.

issues.description: hasActiveOverlay() treats an empty-string errorMessage as active (checks !== null), but the UI only renders ErrorToast when errorMessage is truthy. This creates a semantic mismatch for future consumers (e.g., focus-trap logic).
Test case name says it verifies empty-string handling, but the test actually passes null. The stated edge case is currently untested.

summary: Pass. The content-panel extraction work in this commit correctly centralizes workspace overlays into WorkspaceContentPanel and wires parent-child communication through typed props/actions. No blocking defects were identified; two non-blocking consistency/test-quality issues are noted.
